texto: Spaciousness gives rise to clarity. Clarity gives rise to inspired action. Inspired action gives rise to fulfilling manifestation. When watching the motion of the clouds in the sky each day is enough for your delight, the rest just flows in and through your life as effortlessly as those clouds. Just as day follows night, action follows rest. Do not be afraid to lie fallow until inspired action moves you.
explicacao: Citação de Indigo Ocean sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Spaciousness gives rise to clarity. Clarity gives rise to inspired action. Inspired action gives …” articula reflexao, peace-of-mind, action em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e boa-noite.
